full_text:
Zhongli Xun 鍾離徇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhongli Xun (鍾離徇)was born in Shanyin county, Kuaiji commandery. He died in battle against Jin. Zhongli Xun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
